name: ax-monitor
description: AX usage measurement hook for Claude Code. On SessionEnd (or Stop, per turn) it POSTs the raw session transcript as-is to a measurement server (upload only — no parsing or LLM on the client). Ships a bundled stdlib local verifier that captures/relays the raw record, and bundles the 'install-ax-monitor' and 'uninstall-ax-monitor' skills.
